memberdef.type: std::function< bool(const std::string &address, const std::vector< uint8_t > &signature, const std::vector< uint8_t > &data)>
memberdef.name: VerifySignatureFunc

memberdef.argsstring: (const bool is_full_node, std::string address, SignFunc sign, VerifySignatureFunc verify_signature)
memberdef.name: UTXOManager

simplesect.para: The total balance of the account

briefdescription.para: Get the accounts balance for a specific token.

parameterdescription.para: Token ID to get the balance

simplesect.para: The balance of the account for the specific token

briefdescription.para: Add a new UTXO to the account.

parameterdescription.para: The new UTXO to be added
Address to add the UTXO to

simplesect.para: true if the UTXO was added, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Delete a UTXO from the account.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the UTXO to be deleted
Address to remove the UTXO from
Vector of UTXO information to be consumed

simplesect.para: true if all UTXOs were consumed, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get UTXOs for a specific address.

parameterdescription.para: The address to get UTXOs for

simplesect.para: Vector of UTXOs for the address

briefdescription.para: Set UTXOs for a specific address (replaces existing UTXOs).

parameterdescription.para: Vector of UTXOs to set for the address
The address to set UTXOs for

simplesect.para: True if loaded any UTXOs, false if loaded 0 UTXOs and error if one occurred

memberdef.definition: outcome::result< std::pair< std::vector< InputUTXOInfo >, uint64_t > > sgns::UTXOManager::SelectUTXOs
memberdef.name: SelectUTXOs
